raw: This ParksPass affords free parking at DCR facilities that charge a parking fee. (The ParksPass is not valid for parking at Quabbin Reservoir; the Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots; or for camping.) This ParksPass must be displayed on the rearview mirror in your vehicle at all times while visiting a DCR facility where daily parking fees are charged. Please check www.massparks.org for a list of applicable parks.
